allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./docs-json.json'\); const paths = Object.keys\(d.paths\).filter\(p => p.includes\('option'\)\); paths.forEach\(p => { console.log\('\\n' + p + ':'\); console.log\('  Methods:', Object.keys\(d.paths[p]\).join\(', '\)\); Object.keys\(d.paths[p]\).forEach\(m => { const op = d.paths[p][m]; console.log\('  ' + m.toUpperCase\(\) + ':', op.summary || op.operationId || ''\); }\); }\)")
